content: Devnet requestAirdrop is aggressively rate-limited: official faucet.solana.com caps anonymous users at 2 requests/8h (~5 SOL/day devnet cap overall). This is too restrictive for repeated automated e2e test runs. Recommended for Bastion's devnet e2e suite: mark the airdrop-dependent test with a distinct pytest marker (e.g. @pytest.mark.devnet_e2e), reuse a single funded devnet keypair across the test session/CI cache rather than re-airdropping per run, and treat airdrop failures (429) as a skip, not a hard failure, so CI doesn't flake on faucet exhaustion.
